title: PlayerLogs
description: Logs each player's chat, commands, join, and quit events into separate files.
body:
### PlayerLogs – Simple, Powerful Player Activity Logger for Minecraft (Paper 1.21.4)

**PlayerLogs** is a lightweight yet powerful Minecraft plugin built for **Paper 1.21.4**, designed to automatically track and record every player’s in-game activity with precision and ease.

The plugin creates **dedicated log folders** for each player inside the plugin directory (`plugins/PlayerLogs/<playername>/`), where it organizes their actions into clear, easy-to-read log files:

* **chat.log** – Records everything the player types in chat.
* **commands.log** – Logs every command the player executes.
* **join\_leave.log** – Tracks when players join and leave the server.

This streamlined system gives server administrators a hassle-free way to:

* Monitor player behavior.
* Investigate rule violations.
* Maintain historical records for moderation or review.

**PlayerLogs** works **silently in the background**—no commands, no configuration, no hassle. It begins recording automatically as soon as players join your server.


✅ **Key Features:**

* Automatic, real-time logging of chat, commands, and join/leave events.
* Cleanly organized per-player log files.
* No setup required—works out of the box.
* Lightweight and performance-friendly.


Keep your server safe, fair, and transparent with **PlayerLogs**—the simple solution for server monitoring and record-keeping.
